Install our **ONLYOFFICE SDK** for Python app from pip:
Install our **ONLYOFFICE SDK** for .Net from nuget:

parameters.name: withoutTags
parameters.description: Specifies whether to search by tags or not.

parameters.name: tags
parameters.description: The tags in the serialized format.

parameters.name: excludeSubject
parameters.description: Specifies whether to exclude search by user or group ID.

parameters.name: quotaFilter
parameters.description: The filter by quota (All - 0, Default - 1, Custom - 2).

parameters.name: count
parameters.description: Specifies the maximum number of items to retrieve.

parameters.name: startIndex
parameters.description: The index from which to start retrieving the room content.

parameters.name: sortBy
parameters.description: Specifies the field by which the room content should be sorted.

parameters.name: sortOrder
parameters.description: The order in which the results are sorted.

parameters.name: filterValue
parameters.description: The text filter value used to refine search or query operations.

requestBody.description: The request parameters for updating a room.
The parameters for deleting a room.

put.summary: Change the AI agent quota limit
put.description: Changes the quota limit for the AI agents with the IDs specified in the request.

200.description: List of AI agents with the detailed information

put.summary: Reset the AI agents quota limit
put.description: Resets the quota limit for the AI agents with the IDs specified in the request.

200.description: List of AI agents with the detailed information

post.description: Starts a new chat session in the specified AI agent room. The response is streamed as Server-Sent Events (SSE).

requestBody.description: The body of the request to start a new chat.

get.description: Returns a list of chat sessions in the specified AI agent room.

parameters.name: startIndex
parameters.description: The index from which to start retrieving items.

parameters.name: count
parameters.description: The number of items to retrieve.

post.description: Sends a new message to an existing chat session. The response is streamed as Server-Sent Events (SSE).

requestBody.description: Represents the body content of a request to continue a chat session.

get.description: Returns a list of messages in the specified chat session.

parameters.name: startIndex
parameters.description: The index from which to start retrieving items.

parameters.name: count
parameters.description: The number of items to retrieve.

put.description: Renames an existing chat session with a new name.

requestBody.description: Represents the body of the request for renaming a chat.

get.description: Returns the detailed information about a chat session by its ID.

delete.description: Deletes a chat session and all its messages by the chat ID.

post.description: Exports all messages from a chat session to a file in the specified folder.

requestBody.description: The request body containing details for exporting chat messages.

get.description: Returns a list of available AI models for the specified provider.

post.description: Provides a permission decision (allow or deny) for an MCP tool call during a chat session.

requestBody.description: The body of the tool decision request, containing the decision regarding tool execution.

put.description: Updates the current user's chat settings for the specified AI agent room.

requestBody.description: Represents the body of the request for setting user chat settings.

get.description: Returns the current user's chat settings for the specified AI agent room.

post.description: Adds a new custom MCP server with the specified endpoint, name, description, headers, and icon.

requestBody.description: The request body containing details for adding an MCP server.

delete.description: Deletes one or more MCP servers by their IDs.

requestBody.description: The request body containing the set of server IDs to be deleted.

get.description: Returns a paginated list of all MCP servers configured for the current tenant.

parameters.name: startIndex
parameters.description: The index from which to start retrieving items.

parameters.name: count
parameters.description: The number of items to retrieve.

put.description: Updates the properties of an existing custom MCP server by its ID.

requestBody.description: Contains the request body data for updating a server.

get.description: Returns the information about an MCP server by its ID.

put.description: Enables or disables an MCP server by its ID.

requestBody.description: Represents the request body containing the server status details.

get.description: Returns a paginated list of active (enabled) MCP servers available for use.

parameters.name: startIndex
parameters.description: The index from which to start retrieving items.

parameters.name: count
parameters.description: The number of items to retrieve.

post.summary: Add MCP servers to a room
post.description: Attaches one or more MCP servers to the specified AI agent room.

requestBody.description: Represents the body of the request for adding servers to a room.

200.description: List of MCP server statuses in the room

get.description: Returns a list of MCP servers attached to the specified AI agent room with their statuses.

200.description: List of MCP server statuses in the room

delete.summary: Remove MCP servers from a room
delete.description: Removes one or more MCP servers from the specified AI agent room.

requestBody.description: The request body containing server identifiers to be removed from the room.

put.description: Sets the list of disabled tools for an MCP server in the specified AI agent room.

requestBody.description: Represents the body of the request containing the tools to be updated.

200.description: List of MCP tools with their enabled status

get.description: Returns the list of tools provided by an MCP server in the specified AI agent room with their enabled status.

200.description: List of MCP tools with their enabled status

post.description: Establishes a connection to an MCP server in the specified AI agent room. An optional authorization code can be provided for OAuth-based servers.

requestBody.description:
The request body containing additional data necessary for connecting to the server,
such as authentication or operation-specific information.

post.description: Disconnects an MCP server from the specified AI agent room.
Exports a single chat message to a file in the specified folder.

requestBody.description: Represents the body of the request for exporting a message.

post.description: Adds a new AI provider with the specified title, URL, API key, and type.

get.description: Returns a paginated list of AI providers configured for the current tenant.

parameters.name: startIndex
parameters.description: The index from which to start retrieving items.

parameters.name: count
parameters.description: The number of items to retrieve.

delete.description: Deletes one or more AI providers by their IDs.

put.description: Updates the properties of an existing AI provider by its ID.

requestBody.description: The body of the update request for an AI provider.

get.description: Returns a list of available AI provider types that can be configured.

put.description: Sets the default AI provider for the current tenant.

403.description: You don't have enough permission to manage providers

get.description: Returns the default AI provider for the current tenant.

200.description: Default provider information or null if not set

put.description: Updates the web search configuration for the AI module, including the search provider type and API key.

requestBody.description: Defines the request body containing web search settings.

get.description: Returns the current web search configuration for the AI module.

put.description: Updates the vectorization (embedding) configuration for the AI module, including the embedding provider type and API key.

requestBody.description: Represents the request body containing the vectorization configuration settings.

get.description: Returns the current vectorization (embedding) configuration for the AI module.
Returns the combined AI settings including web search and vectorization configuration.

post.description: Starts a vectorization task for the specified files. The files will be processed and their content will be converted to vector embeddings for AI search.

requestBody.description: Represents the body of the vectorization start request.

headers.description: The optional HTTP headers for the MCP server.

servers.description: The set of server IDs to add to the room.

items.description: The list of file entry items.

needReset.description: Indicates whether the provider API key needs to be reset.

isDefault.description: Indicates whether this is the default provider.

webSearchEnabled.description: Specifies whether the web search feature is enabled.

webSearchNeedReset.description: Specifies whether the web search settings need to be reset.

vectorizationEnabled.description: Specifies whether the vectorization feature is enabled.

vectorizationNeedReset.description: Specifies whether the vectorization settings need to be reset.

aiReady.description: Specifies whether the AI module is ready for use.

aiReadyNeedReset.description: Specifies whether the AI readiness settings need to be reset.

embeddingModel.description: The name of the embedding model used for vectorization.

knowledgeSearchToolName.description: The name of the knowledge search tool.

webSearchToolName.description: The name of the web search tool.

webCrawlingToolName.description: The name of the web crawling tool.

ApiDateTime.description: The API date and time parameters.

internal.description: Specifies whether the provider is internal or not.

indexing.description: Specifies whether to create a room with indexing.

denyDownload.description: Specifies whether to deny downloads from the room.

private.description: Specifies whether the room to be created is private or not.

attachDefaultTools.description: Specifies whether to attach default tools to the agent or not.

defaultModel.description: Default model identifier used with this provider.

deleteAfter.description: Specifies whether to delete a room after the editing session is finished or not.

DeleteRoomRequest.description: The parameters for deleting a room.

servers.description: The set of server IDs to remove from the room.
The set of server IDs to delete.

[0 - Created, 1 - Running, 2 - Completed, 3 - Canceled, 4 - Failted]

sharedForUser.description: Specifies if the file entry is shared for user or not.

providerKey.description: The provider key of the file entry.

order.description: The order of the file entry.

originId.description: The origin ID of the file entry.

originTitle.description: The origin title of the file entry.

security.description: The actions that can be performed with the file entry.

availableShareRights.description: The available external rights of the file entry.

requestToken.description: The request token of the file entry.

external.description: Specifies if the folder can be accessed via an external link or not.

isLinkExpired.description: Indicates whether the shareable link associated with the file or folder has expired.

[1 - Folder, 2 - File]

progress.description: The file operation progress in percentage.

finished.description: Specifies if the file operation is finished or not.

folders.description: The list of folders of the file operation.
